creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 211094
scintilla-4.3.0.patch

* Update x11-toolkits/scintilla and editors/scite to 4.2.3
* Update distinfo on both
* Update both to use GTK+3 instead of GTK+2
* Bump version on Scintilla library due to GTK change
* Update both to detect Clang and set MAKE_ARGS accordingly
* Update makefile patches on both

Changelog: https://www.scintilla.org/ScintillaHistory.html

Both pass portlint. Both tested in poudriere for 11-i186, 11-amd64, 12-i386 and 12-amd64.
